title: Special And Hazardous Duty Pay
summary: MCAAT Admin checklist - Special And Hazardous Duty Pay. 42 unique items across 3 audiences.
applicabilityLevel: IPAC, Reporting Unit, and Supporting Unit

source.title: MCAAT Admin Checklist - Special And Hazardous Duty Pay
source.publisher: Marine Corps Manpower and Reserve Affairs

items.question: Is Demolition Duty Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is Jump Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is Flight Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is Dive Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?

Is the unit ensuring required Page 11's entries for AIP/VSI payment elections are completed IAW applicable regulations and are they filed in OMPF within 10 working days of the date of certification on unit diary?
Is Special Duty Allowance (SDA), Assignment Incentive Pay (AIP) and Voluntary Supplemental Incentives (VSI) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Are VSI/AIP lump sum recoupment waivers signed by an O6 level commander? Are AIP lump sum recoupment waivers submitted to the reporting prior to the Marine's transfer?

Is the unit ensuring only those billets/personnel that are authorized to receive demolition pay are receiving it? Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that substantiate payment of Demolition Pay are prepared IAW applicable regulations?
Is Demolition Duty Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring Marines that participate in diving duty are assigned by competent orders and maintained on file to substantiate payment of dive pay?

Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that validates payment of Jump Pay are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies? (assignment order, unit command endorsement, and unit jump logs).
Is Jump Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is Special Duty Allowance (SDA), Assignment Incentive Pay (AIP) and Voluntary Supplemental Incentives (VSI) reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring Marines performing special duty are recertified NLT 12 months from the last certification?
Are Marines who terminate SDA early (relieved for cause) being checked VSI/AIP lump sum?

Is the unit ensuring required Page 11's entries for AIP/VSI payment elections are completed IAW applicable regulations and are they filed in OMPF within 10 working days of the date of certification on unit diary?
Is Dive Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring monthly flight audit boards are conducted?
Is the unit ensuring Flight Duty assignment orders are prepared IAW applicable regulations?
Is Flight Pay reported IAW applicable regulations?
Are aeronautical orders submitted to and received by the reporting unit within 5 days of assignment? Note: Applies to the MATSGs
Is the unit ensuring Assignment Incentive Pay/Voluntary Supplemental Incentives lump sum Page 11's are filed in OMPF within 10 working days of the effective date?

Is the unit ensuring Marine performing special duty are recertified NLT the 12th month. Is the unit ensuring the SDA annual recertification(s) are submitted to the reporting unit no later than 5 days after the end of the month?
Are aeronautical orders submitted to and received by the reporting unit within 5 days of assignment?

Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that substantiate payment of Special Duty Allowance (SDA), Assignment Incentive Pay (AIP) and Voluntary Supplemental Incentives (VSI) are submitted to the reporting unit within 5 days of the effective date?
Is the unit validating Jump Pay is reported IAW applicable regulations by the reporting unit?

Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that validates payment of Jump Pay are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies? (assignment order, unit command endorsement, and unit jump logs).
Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that substantiate payment of Jump Pay are submitted to and received by the reporting unit no later than 5 days after the end of the month?
Is the unit validating Flight Pay is reported IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit ensuring key supporting document that validates payment of Flight Pay are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?
Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that substantiates payment of Flight Pay are submitted to and received by the reporting unit no later than 5 days after the end of the month?
Is the unit ensuring monthly flight audit boards are conducted?
Is the unit ensuring Flight Duty assignment orders are prepared IAW applicable regulations?
Is the unit validating Dive Pay is reported IAW applicable regulations by the reporting unit?
Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that validates payment of Dive Pay are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?

Is the unit ensuring Marines that are required to participate in diving duty are assigned by competent orders, and ensuring assignment orders that substantiate payment of dive pay are submitted to and received by the reporting unit, no later than 5 days after the annual re-certification?
Are Marines who terminate SDA early (relieved for cause) being checked Assignment Incentive Pay/Voluntary Supplemental Incentives lump sum?

Are Assignment Incentive Pay/Voluntary Supplemental Incentives lump sum recoupment waivers signed by an O6 level commander? Are AIP lump sum recoupment waivers submitted to the reporting prior to the Marine's transfer?

Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents to validate payment of Special Duty Allowance (SDA), Assignment Incentive Pay (AIP) and Voluntary Supplemental Incentives (VSI) are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?

Is the unit ensuring that key supporting documents that substantiate payment of Demolition Pay are submitted to and received by the reporting unit on a monthly basis, no later than 5 days after the end of the month?
Is the unit ensuring key supporting documents that validates payment of Demolition Pay are maintained on file for audit, and in accordance with retention policies?
Is the unit ensuring Demolition Pay is reported IAW applicable regulations by the reporting unit?
